# mxroute_domains (Data Source)

Lists every mail domain on the MXroute account. For one domain's details, use the `mxroute_domain` data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_domains" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `domains` (List of String) The names of all domains on the account.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — a fixed value for this account-wide list.
